top_signals.title: Chancellor Rachel Reeves statement to Parliament
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has today (21 May) updated the House of Commons on the Government's economic response to the war in Iran, and the action they are taking to support families and businesses with the Cost of Living.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Coal Mine Explosion Kills 90 in Deadliest Blast Since 2009
top_signals.summary: A coal mine gas explosion in China’s Shanxi province has killed at least 90 people in the country’s deadliest such incident since 2009, prompting President Xi Jinping to urge nationwide efforts to curb major industrial accidents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
